title: agrostis stolonifera var. major
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. major, commonly known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of grass that is native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of creeping bentgrass typically involve infusions and decoctions of the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
